title: melicope segregis
intro: Melicope segregis, also known as the Lemon-leaf or Yellow Hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to the Pacific islands and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Melicope segregis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Pacific region.
